name: 03_mc_present_arm_behavior_unchanged
description: Regression guard: when MC IS present (prob_beating is a real float in the arming range), the arming behavior must be byte-identical to pre-fix. The arming condition `TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT <= prob_beating < TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT` still controls arming; the fail-open path must not fire.

scenarios.name: mc_present_in_arming_range_arms
scenarios.note: prob_beating in [TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT, TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT) -> should_arm=True, same as before fix

expected.derivation: mc_available=True AND prob in arming range -> original arming path fires. Fix must not break this path.

scenarios.name: mc_present_above_arming_range_does_not_arm
scenarios.note: prob_beating >= TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT -> outside arming window -> not armed. Fix must not change this.

expected.derivation: MC present but above trigger threshold -> original gate: `if mc_available and TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT <= prob_beating < TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT` fails. Not in arming range. Fix must not arm here either.

scenarios.name: mc_present_below_take_profit_does_not_arm
scenarios.note: prob_beating < TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT -> below arming window -> not armed

expected.derivation: MC present but below TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT -> original gate fails. Not in arming range. Fix must not arm here.
